summary:
LOCATION AND PROPHETIC VISIONS: Brandon broadcasts from a Freemason temple in Oklahoma during a solar eclipse, which he identifies as a divine sign for America to repent. He describes this specific temple, noted for its stained glass and gargoyles and its history as the state's original capital, as a future site of Antichrist worship. Brandon recounts a vision where he stood at this location with Jesus, observing multitudes of people in white outfits standing on small mats in single-file lines, forced to worship the Antichrist via massive screens projected onto the buildings on Fridays.

GLOBAL GOVERNMENT AND END TIMES WARNINGS: Brandon outlines upcoming global changes, including the establishment of a one-world government, the implementation of microchips, and the presence of drones in the sky. He asserts that the current global and economic systems will soon become irrelevant. Emphasizing the urgency of the times, Brandon warns that the window for repentance is rapidly closing and urges listeners to turn away from their current paths to avoid becoming part of the future crowds worshiping the Antichrist.

COMING REVIVAL AND MASS HARVEST: Brandon predicts a massive, unprecedented outpouring of the Holy Spirit, referencing the biblical book of Joel chapter 2. He compares this impending spiritual event to the historical Azusa Street revival but notes it will be shorter in duration, lasting a maximum of six months based on his visions. During this period, Brandon foresees thousands experiencing healing and salvation, culminating in a billion-soul harvest immediately preceding the rapture or catching away of the church.

HEALTH MANDATE AND COMING PLAGUE: Brandon details a personal directive from God to lose 100 pounds, which he connects to a forthcoming global plague. He recounts a vision of massive tents filled with the sick, predicting the deaths of 350 million people worldwide, including 30 million in America alone. Brandon explicitly links susceptibility to this coming plague to health conditions such as obesity, diabetes, and heart disease, noting his own progress of losing nearly 60 pounds and dropping shirt sizes over three months as direct preparation to survive these events.

I see everybody. I see them in the chat. I was going to tell y'all, I am standing right now at the location during the eclipse where it will be full right now, I guess, in Oklahoma. But I'm standing at the temple where they will worship the Antichrist one day. And I'm telling y'all, it's coming. I believe with all my heart, Jesus Christ is coming, and he's coming soon. Is this a sign for Israel? No. This is a sign for America to repent. I believe with all my heart we're seeing a major opportunity for America to turn from its wicked ways and repent. And Jesus wants to forgive us and heal our land. Just a little bit ago, around the sun, we had a massive rainbow. It was in the clouds, and I thought it was the coolest thing ever with the sun and the rainbow there. So I was just like, 'Wow, another cool thing happening as we speak.' But this is where they will worship the Antichrist one day. All these fields will be packed full of people on Fridays, all lined up worshiping the Antichrist. And I believe with all my heart you have time to repent. I believe with all my heart you have time to change and ask Jesus to be your Lord and Savior. This is a time for you. You woke up today. What are you going to do with today? I was talking to my son and said, 'You know what? There's still time. There's still time for people to give their heart to Jesus, but I'm telling you that time is running out.' It's like the hourglass and the sands of time. We're running out of that time because Jesus Christ is about to come back and get his church. And at that time, it's over. But today is your day of salvation. Today is your day of repentance. You can do it. You can turn from your wicked ways and make Jesus your Lord and Savior. Don't be one of the people that's going to one day be in this field worshiping the Antichrist, because there's going to be a time it's going to happen. And I'm telling you, I've seen it. I stood here with Jesus. It was actually right over there. I stood with Jesus and I watched the people on these massive screens. They're going to be on the side of these buildings and they're going to project it on Fridays, and you'll be made to worship him here at this place right here. And I don't say that to freak everybody out, but I'm just being real. It happens, you know. But as it gets darker and darker, we're seeing another sign. And I just thought I would come on, go live, and show you all around what the eclipse looks like. It's kind of cool. It still has that halo a little bit. Yeah, a little bit. All right. Right there. There you go. You can kind of see it. Such a creepy building, isn't it? Yeah, the people have no idea what's coming. A lot of people don't. It just freaks me out. I mean, clear to the curbs, y'all. They come from all around these towns. And they're all in a single-file line and they're at a little mat and they have white outfits on and it all happens right here. And it happens all the way around it. It's a big place. It's a lot of land here. But a lot of beautiful little homes, but all that's not going to matter. You know, the economy and everything. Everything's going to go to one world government. The chips, all of it. The drones flying in the air. It's going to be crazy. But I just, like I said, I just wanted to come on and do a little video for y'all and tell you it's something so spiritual for me. I know that Jesus is coming soon. I can feel it regardless. Like I said, people go, 'Well, you're quoting dates and times and all that,' and I said, 'No, I'm not.' Even my little girl can feel it. But I don't know. It's kind of cool. But I wasn't going to make it a long video. I just wanted to tell y'all Jesus loves you. He wants the best. 800 people watching. Oh, really? 849? Yeah. You can turn around and flip it so you can see your face. You want to do that? So you can watch the live chat while I'm talking. Okay. I haven't done all that stuff. I believe with all my heart that, and even what the word says, we're going to see Joel chapter 2. I believe it will be a revival that doesn't last a long time like Azusa Street; I believe it lasted like three or four years. Believe big or go home, right before we go home. But isn't it a really creepy building? Yeah. I mean, seriously, it's such a creepy building. All that is old stained glass windows and the gargoyle things on the top. It's just creepy. I don't know why he chose it here. This is a Freemason temple, by the way. It's coming off a little slower than it was at the beginning, but it's coming off. It's inches now. It seems like I was a size 4X in a shirt and now I'm down to a large. I got a new shirt and it's a large. People are saying they like your new shirt. They do? Yeah, they like it. I got a large shirt, so I was excited to be able to fit a large today. I said, "Praise the Lord, it's coming off." I don't know if I'll get down to a size medium. I kind of want to be a loose large, maybe. I've still got forty-some pounds left for what the Lord told me to get to. That's a lot, but I'll get there one day at a time. Eating right and exercising—it's weird. I hope this video is not boring. I just wanted to do something for you all to show you how close we are to Jesus coming.]
